scope: no-training frozen-checkpoint attribution of middle-noise endpoint recoverability, reciprocal-shell residual power and a held-out frozen low-k linear correction; no denoiser, loss, path or sampler change

retrieval_oracle.descriptor: complete type-partitioned periodic pair distances plus log volume and normalized-metric log eigenvalues

decision_rule.pass: only if all three checks pass, freeze a separate no-training mathematical/CUDA qualification for one O(NQ) reciprocal carrier before any training
decision_rule.fail: do not implement a reciprocal carrier; retain the active dynamic factorized Cartesian local field and attribute the next investigation according to the failed check
decision_rule.boundary: No threshold, time, panel, band, ridge or seed may be changed after viewing results. This audit cannot change H1a, revive the failed pairwise reciprocal residual, add training steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor/oracle training, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
